title: A Good Death Beats a Dull Life
original_title: Hijas de su madre: Las Buenrostro
overview: The women of a prosperous provincial family hide unsuspected secrets which range from the entanglements of love to murder for mercy or for greed. The story of these eccentric women combines love, potions, black humor and death.
